title: Pattern-generic Gershgorin reduction of the beyond-layer bound
statement:
Lemmas A (Gershgorin--Schur row bound), B (second-order log-det envelope with the isotropic trace identity), C$'$ (transfer matching: $|w_t|\le 2\lambda' I$, $m_t\le 2n$, exact $\ell^1$ identity $\sum_t|w_t| \le \lambda'(4S^2-2I)$), and D ($\ell^2$ mass $\le 8n(\lambda' I)^2$) are rigorous and pattern-independent. They yield the DERIVED closed-region theorem: STEP-5B holds for every admissible single-shell pattern with $n \le n_{\max}(I)$ = 62/31/16/6/3 at $I = 10^{-4}..2	imes10^{-3}$ ($a\le0.75$). Residual: G1$'$ (thin-spread, $n > n_{\max}(I)$) + G2 (vertex bookkeeping). v1.3 adds Lemma E (sphere additive energy, diagonal/off-diagonal split): $\sum_t|w_t|^2 \le 4\lambda'^2I^2(\varphi+
u^*)$ with participation $\varphi=n\sum A_i^4/I^2$ and discrete nonzero-translate overlap $
u^*$ — giving the transversal n-FREE corollary ($
u^*\le4$, $\varphi\le1$: margin ratios 131x/16x/2x at $I=4	imes10^{-4}/10^{-3}/2	imes10^{-3}$). v1.4 closes G1''(ring) for the canonical family: the equal-amplitude two-ring pattern has the EXACT closed form $c_{m ring}(n) = 14-18/n$ (n even; two heavy axial transfers $w=\lambda' I$) and $8-6/n$ (n odd; no axial resonance), both $<14$, any height — proven by five-orbit decomposition and verified to $10^{-10}$ at $n=7..64$. v1.6 (closing sweep): Lemma F (collar heavy-mass bound, provable bilinear constant $2\lambda'I(\kappa+
u_S^{
e})$) + REGISTERED NEGATIVE RESULT — the row/collar-ladder route fails $a<1$ at production $I$ ($a_{m prov}=2.20/4.68$ at $n=12/24$); G1''(row) reduces to the $\mathrm{tr}\,X^4$ additive-energy ($E_4$) moment problem (designated attack G1''-M4). G2 bookkeeping CLOSED at second-cumulant level: Lemma H (sextic $\varepsilon_4=60vnI/\lambda'\le0.16$ on the closed region), Lemma I ($\sigma$-channel completeness, exact to $10^{-12}$), Lemma J (two-shell floor $	imes1.70$). Composite-glue $\ell^2$ theorem ($
u_{m cross}\le4$; certificate validated: measured 9.27 vs 34.23). v1.7 (structural theorem): $W=\lambda'(P^2-2I\,\mathrm{Id})$ with $P=\sum_u A_uS_u$ self-adjoint $\Rightarrow$ $D+W=D_0+\lambda'P^2\ge D_0>0$ UNCONDITIONAL and spectral floor $X\ge-a_0$, $a_0=2\lambda'I/\hat r$ ($0.021$ at anchor) — n-free, pattern-free. G1''-M4 CLOSED BY STRUCTURE; Gershgorin $a<1$ obsolete. Enlarged closed region $N_{\max}(I)=12133/3017/746/115/27$ (vs 62/31/16/6/3, $	imes46$ at anchor). Residual = G1'''-AE: class-wide $\sum w_t^2\le K(\lambda'I)^2$ on the corner {n>N_max, non-transversal, non-ring}; G-DEC demoted to sub-route. v1.8: position-space structure — $P$ = multiplication by $F(x)=\phi_n(x)$, $W=\lambda'(F^2-2I)$ multiplication operator, floor POINTWISE; Nambu/anomalous objection DISCHARGED (real scalar, single real Hessian, Math427 $\hat K$). Parseval: $\sum_{t
e0}w_t^2=\lambda'^2(\langle F^4angle-4I^2)$ — G1'''-AE IS the discrete sphere $L^4$-extension problem (Stein--Tomas $q=4$, $d=3$). UNIVERSAL SINGLE-CIRCLE THEOREM: any amplitudes/n/height, $\sum_{t
e0}w_t^2\le14\lambda'^2I_c^2$, SHARP (rings attain $14-18/n$) — equal-amplitude caveat REMOVED. Coaxial probe $K=9.9/10.4/10.7$ bounded (pre-registered falsification class). v1.9: ANTIPODAL-CARRIER PARTITION (every pair is an antipodal pair of exactly one circle; $\Phi_s=\Psi_{C_s}$; l1/l2 exact); IDENTITY $
u^*=\mu_C$ (transversality = circle-thinness — one parameter, two routes); COAXIAL-CLASS CLOSURE ($K\le30$ absolute; off-axis carriers $\le4$ ordered pairs; mirror carrier at $s=0$ excluded; measured 9.4/10.7 — the pre-registered suspected-hard class is CLOSED); H-GEN(2) FALSIFIED honestly (10 ordered pairs on a non-cluster carrier of a symmetric union) — G1'''-AE SHARPENED to the carrier-richness bound $p_0(P)$. v2.0 (major re-issue, verdict #8): coaxial lemma repaired with explicit height-sum multiplicity $H^*$ (AP-height audit: forced coincidences give $H^*=1$ — in-plane reflection separates cluster pairs; $K=9.25/8.75/8.54$ decreasing with $m$; weighted 8.31). RECTANGLE REFORMULATION: off-diagonal carrier energy = weighted count of rectangles inscribed in sphere circles; diagonal $\le8I^2$ unconditional. TRIPLE-COUNT THEOREM ($\sum_Ck_C^3=O(n^3)$) $\Rightarrow$ $R=O(n^{5/2})$ UNCONDITIONAL; $\kappa$-balanced $K(n)\le8+c_R\sqrt n$ (prefactor measured) $\Rightarrow$ region upgraded to $\sim2.2{	imes}10^6/5.3{	imes}10^4/2.8{	imes}10^3$ modes at $I=4{	imes}10^{-4}/10^{-3}/2{	imes}10^{-3}$. AddA (rectangle-constant closure, 2026-06-05): OPERATOR-DERIVED theorem-grade prefactor $c_R=4\sqrt{14}\simeq14.97$ (verdict #9; $\sum p^3\le7N^3$ + interpolation) — region $1.59{	imes}10^5$ at anchor; NEW INCIDENCE ROUTE (stereographic transfer + Aronov--Sharir rich-circle bounds + pair cap): $\sum_Cp_C^2=O(N^{28/13}\,{m polylog})$, region $7.9{	imes}10^{16}$ at anchor; CONDITIONAL CLOSURE under named {H-KBAL, H-ADM} with any $n_{m adm}<7.9{	imes}10^{16}$ (mode separation $\gtrsim10^{-8}$); sharp $O(n^2)$ conjecture pre-registered (measured exponents 2.04--2.08 on all worst families). AddA v1.1 (verdict #10 repairs): c_R route ACCEPTED theorem-grade = OFFICIAL ledger threshold ($n\lesssim1.59{	imes}10^5$ at anchor under H-KBAL); incidence exponent REPAIRED $28/13	o20/9$ (operator-caught catch #7; dyadic self-check ratio 1.1), provisional reach $2.2{	imes}10^{10}$ NOT used for tier; 7.9e16 WITHDRAWN; dichotomy program registered (DR-1 circle no-small-doubling proved in substance; DR-2 sphere structure dichotomy OPEN = designated multi-turn route to sharp $O(N^2)$). AddA v1.2 (verdict #11 repairs + H-KBAL lift): three flagged stale spots repaired (sec-1 28/13 remnant; sec-5 sanity 28/13+7.9e16 ratio; footer evidence-grade split ANALYTIC/PROVISIONAL). NEW H-KBAL LIFT THEOREM: arbitrary amplitudes, $\sum_{t
e0}w_t^2\le64\sqrt7\,\lambda'^2I^2\sqrt n\log^2(2n)+O(\lambda'^2I^2)$ (dyadic classes + per-class interpolation + bilinear energy CS + Minkowski) — kappa-balance structurally removed (constants only); measured worst unbalanced ratio 0.03 vs ceiling 2929; ledger threshold unchanged (sharp-constant balanced route 1.59e5). AddB (coherence admissibility, T3 PROOF SKETCH): H-ADM derived from microphysics — strongly dressed regime ($\hat r/Cq_0^4=1.45$), $\xi=2q_0\sqrt{C/\hat r}=2.44$, $	heta_{\min}=0.603$ rad, $n_{m adm}\approx35$ (x4: 140), nearly I-independent (35/34/32); $K(4n_{m adm})=184<$ budget at ALL anchor intensities (x32.4/x5.1/x1.2) — STEP-5B CLOSES under the proposed class amendment H-ADM-COH (sub-resolution modes reclassify into the Gaussian sea, quantifying the operator's verdict-#9 observation). Amendment binding status requires operator sign-off. AddC (indistinguishability lemma, T4): exact splitting fibers $6/9/(12-6/n)\,I^2$ — fragmentation gain SATURATES; $|F[P']-F[P]|\le c_{m ind}I^2$, $c_{m ind}=1.5|U|+6\lambda'^2J(0)/(4(1-a_0))=30.1$ ($J(0)=0.290$); margin ratios x898/x139/x33 — sub-resolution restructuring is ENERGY-FAITHFUL, upgrading H-ADM-COH from proposal to derived quotient statement. De-thinned closure: $n_{m pack}=16/	heta_{\min}^2\approx44$, $K\approx107$, margins x55.6/x8.8/x2.1 (AddB thin corner repaired). AddA v1.3: verdict-#12 stale fixes (sec-3 heading 20/9; footer scope precision). AddD (operator-directed adoption record, verdict #13): H-ADM-COH ADOPTED as the admissible-competitor definition within the matched second-cumulant B5 scope; CROSS-READING LEMMA machine-certified (whole-pattern 3-fold splitting: $\Delta E=+0.67/+0.40\,I^2\ll6I^2$ budget; $\ell^1$ grows exactly as Lemma C' demands — catch #8 self-caught); ASSEMBLED CLOSURE: STEP-5B holds for the amended class at margins x55.6/x8.8/x2.1. Status: DRAFT-CLOSED pending operator verdict #14 (gate flip + tier action). AddE (polish closure): (a) $c_{m cross}$ ANALYTIC PIN — exact cross recombination requires exact additive coincidence, which forces co-circularity (sphere$\cap$translate = circle); curvature splits all non-co-circular alignments (adversarial aligned-AP audit: exact multiplicity 2 = trivial; co-circular control: multiplicity 6 but $K=12.20<14$ absorbed by the universal single-circle theorem) — $c_{m total}\le20$, DEPTH-FREE. (b) ENDPOINT HARDENING — criterion band $[1,\pi]/(q_0\xi)$ has its conservative end at the current $	heta_{\min}$ (floors); amended-class minimum transfer $|t|\ge2q_0\sin(	heta_{\min}/2)$ gives $J_{m eff}=0.256/0.226<J_{\max}$: closure margins hardened to x59.4 / x2.6 (floors; band tops x290.9 / x12.7).
scope: T6 PROVED-CONDITIONAL on H_B5^T6 = {H-NONLATTICE-REMAINDER-EXCLUDED} ONLY (2026-06-12 sunset-hardening enactment: H-ENDPOINT-THINNESS-ACCEPTED REMOVED after the operator clean-run CONFIRM of scscope_sunset_pertransfer.py 8/8 -- S x1.129 -> x2.994, endpoint joint x1.040 -> x2.023 / x1.082 -> x2.396, COMFORTABLE SUNSET-HARDENED; registered SC-SCOPE-SunsetHardened-T6-260612). The single remaining B5 T7 blocker is T-030 (arbitrary non-lattice Q; frontier records R-033 N^{9/4} mod [CIRC-INC] + R-034 R1-bridge; OPEN for N^{2+eps}). T6 PROVED-CONDITIONAL on H_B5^T6 (operator verdicts D1-A/D2-A/D3-A, 2026-06-12; package label B5-BeyondLayer-T6Conditional-260612; dossier t6-conditional-assignment-260612-v1.0): scope = CLOSED@LATTICE-DISCHARGED + NONLATTICE-REMAINDER(T-030). H_B5^T6 = {lattice-class H-ADM-COH discharged (D1-A; R-026 T7-NTstandard + R-027 + R-028, residual (a) pinned by the 2,644,976-sum exhaustive check); non-lattice remainder explicitly excluded / frontier-tracked (T-030, non-load-bearing for the C_full head: Lemma 2 caps T'<=10); SC-SCOPE endpoint thinness accepted; sunset-limited joint x1.040>1 accepted as sufficient}. NOT T7: the endpoint is structurally thin (sunset-capped x1.13) and non-lattice exhaustiveness is frontier bookkeeping. [PRIOR SCOPE, superseded 2026-06-12:] T5 PINNED-CLOSURE, scope = CLOSED@H-ADM-COH-AMENDED-CLASS (second-cumulant order), operator-authorized 2026-06-06 (directive 'proceed with item 2'). Within the H-ADM-COH amended competitor class at matched second-cumulant order, the beyond-layer off-diagonal correction is bounded below the layer margin for every admissible pattern (STEP-5B CLOSED-CONDITIONAL; floors x59.4/x8.8/x2.6). Above T4 (gate flipped, theorem-grade pillars); below T6 (chain has T4-grade lemmas, endpoint thin, SC-SCOPE marginal). NOT unrestricted (DR-2 research-grade); NOT all-orders (SC-SCOPE).
falsifier: An admissible pattern inside a certified box (a(P)<1) whose exact off-diagonal Bloch correction exceeds the Lemma-B envelope; or any pattern undercutting the +0.00432 band margin at the anchor.

reproduction.expected: claims 192/192 PASS (exit 0); closure margins x59.4/x8.8/x2.6 across the anchor band

no_overclaim: OPERATOR REVIEW 2026-06-06 (tiers FROZEN): B5 is T5 PINNED-CLOSURE ONLY under CLOSED@H-ADM-COH-AMENDED-CLASS + second-cumulant scope -- NOT unrestricted, NOT all-orders, T6 FORBIDDEN now. The 192/192 is an EXECUTED reproducibility package within the pinned scope, NOT a physical unconditional proof: it does not remove the H-ADM-COH class amendment or SC-SCOPE. External text must separate 'executed closure package' from 'physical theorem closure'. The endpoint margin x2.6 is thin and the third-cumulant endpoint is marginal, which is exactly why this is below T6. The unrestricted result is DR-2 (off-critical research branch; DR2-SHARE the formal obstruction). The 20/9 incidence route is provisional and not in the closure path. No tier action on B1.
next_action: Promotion to T6 would require discharging the T4-grade lemmas (indistinguishability, cross-reading) to theorem grade + a clean conditional-theorem statement; the unrestricted T7 path is DR-2 (research-grade). Standing decision H-A0 -> H-ANCHOR remains.

Script v1.8.0, 155/155. Script v1.13.1, 189/189. Closure path fully analytic + pinned. INCIDENT 2026-06-06: an autonomous-agent tool-layer write truncated this card mid-string (CLAUDE.md sec-2 defect class). Restored from git HEAD plus this session's verified AddB-AddE field values (each passed lint/catalog/release/pytest at its turn). The autonomous U1-U16 notes remain on disk as UNVERIFIED DRAFTS (PDFs/linter pending) and did NOT modify this card. ASSIGNED T4 -> T5 PINNED-CLOSURE (scope CLOSED@H-ADM-COH-AMENDED-CLASS, second-cumulant) 2026-06-06, operator-authorized (directive 'proceed with item 2'; note t5-assignment-dossier v2.0, v1.0 superseded). Self-adversarial review (5 objections: H-ADM-COH scope dependence, endpoint/SC-SCOPE thinness, 20/9-route independence, reproduction package, tier-monotonicity vs B1) — none upheld. Rationale: above T4 (gate CLOSED-CONDITIONAL via verdict #14, theorem-grade pillars R-001/c_R/R-002/R-003) but below T6 (chain includes T4-grade lemmas; endpoint x2.6; SC-SCOPE marginal) = PINNED-CLOSURE. DR-2 RESIDUAL FORMALISED 2026-06-08 (dr2-pencil-rigidity-reduction v1.0, dr2_cross_energy_lemma.py 6/6; Tier-2/3 incorporation of operator-supplied external research Math447-469): the DR2-SHARE / unrestricted-class residual is reduced to ONE named conjecture. (a) Cross-energy lemma R-021 T7: E_off(A,B) <= 2 min(|A|^2-|A|, |B|^2-|B|), full E_+ <= 3|A||B|, via r_P(w)<=2 for w!=0 (parallel and non-parallel); CORRECTS the external 'E_+<=2|A||B|' which drops the w=0 diagonal (witness E_+=720>512). (b) Pencil Rigidity / Pair-Sum Surface Multiplicity CONJECTURE T2 with pre-registered falsification gate E_+(Q_N)>=N^{2+delta}. (c) Reduction PSM => DR-2 T3 sketch (gaps: decomposition existence = the conjecture; per-cluster constant uniformity). DR-2 stays OPEN off critical path; B5 stays T5, B1 stays T6, H-ADM-COH route unchanged. The external T7_conditional-robust label is NOT adopted. Note seeds the independent paper 'Additive Energy and Spherical Rectangle Counts on S^2'. DR-2 DECOUPLING ROUTE 2026-06-08, CORRECTED after operator audit (dr2-decoupling-closure v1.1, dr2_decoupling_exponent.py 4/4; reviews/2026-06-08-dr2-decoupling-critical-audit.md): the l2-decoupling route is PROMISING but NOT a closure as first drafted. Audit findings: the E_+ = integral|f|^4 TORUS identity is FALSE for non-integer q in S^2 (corrected to the Besicovitch limit / Schwartz majorant); the non-separated multi-scale reduction was omitted (now written, cross-scale energy step OPEN); N^{2+eps} was conflated with N^2 log^B. Honest grade: SEPARATED Q is T6 PROVED CONDITIONAL on Bourgain-Demeter decoupling (d=3, p=4); ARBITRARY finite Q (DR-2 proper) is T3 PROOF SKETCH. The PSM/Pencil-Rigidity conjecture is provable in the SEPARATED case only; R-021 cross-energy lemma stands. Curvature mechanism + numerics stand (sphere exponent ~2 vs flat ~3; sharpens R-007 N^{5/2} toward N^{2+eps}). R-022 downgraded T6->T4. NO flip performed: DR2-SHARE stays OPEN, B5 stays T5, B1 stays T6, and H-ADM-COH STAYS in the B1 hypothesis set. External T7_conditional-robust label still not adopted. DR-2 AFFINE-INVARIANCE 2026-06-08 (dr2_affine_invariance.py 4/4, R-023): the operator-audit clustering / cross-scale concern is RESOLVED in principle -- additive energy is EXACTLY affine-invariant, and the paraboloid's parabolic rescaling (xi,t)->(xi/lam,t/lam^2) unfolds any cap-cluster to a unit-scale config of identical energy, so clustering cannot produce N^3; extreme-clustering numerics show exponent ~2 uniformly down to 0.05-rad caps. The UNRESTRICTED DR-2 is thereby lifted T3 PROOF SKETCH -> T4 STRONG EVIDENCE (separated case stays T6 PROVED CONDITIONAL on decoupling). R-023 (affine-invariance, T7). STILL NO FLIP: the full induction-on-scales is cited not reproduced (not yet T6); DR2-SHARE stays OPEN, B5 stays T5, B1 stays T6, H-ADM-COH retained in B1. DR-2 DECOUPLING v1.1 RE-ISSUE 2026-06-08 (operator review of the corrected note + versioning-rule compliance): re-issued as dr2-decoupling-closure-260608-260608-v1.1 (v1.0 SUPERSEDED, pointer added). v1.1 adds Section 2.1 resolving the operator review's four Schwartz-majorant rigor points -- the upper bound E_+ <= C int|f|^4 eta_R is GAP-INDEPENDENT because hat-eta >= 0 (off-diagonal terms only ADD), with R matched to the decoupling ball R~delta^{-1}; so the SEPARATED-case majorant-to-decoupling link is clean modulo the cited decoupling theorem. Grades UNCHANGED: separated T6 PROVED CONDITIONAL, unrestricted T4 STRONG EVIDENCE, DR-2 OPEN, NO flip, H-ADM-COH retained. (Process: prior same-session in-place edits of v1.0 should have been versioned re-issues; corrected going forward.) DR-2 CROSS-SCALE INDUCTION 2026-06-08 (dr2-cross-scale-induction v1.0, dr2_decoupling_iteration.py 3/3, R-024): the cross-scale energy step (the operator's named residual) is now WRITTEN -- the decoupling-iteration inequality E_+(Q) <=_eps delta^{-eps} (sum_theta sqrt E_+(Q_theta))^2 is DERIVED from decoupling + the v1.1 majorant, and with the R-023 affine rescaling recurses arbitrary finite Q to the separated base case; the iteration constant is numerically bounded (K<=1.94, scale-stable; the partition reduces additive structure ~50x).
